subject: Naming micro-service - Helm chart values updates.
commit_message:
Naming micro-service - Helm chart values updates.

Changes requested by Yuriy.
Remove A&AI certificate and use base64 encoded policy password.
Changed policy URL.

Issue-ID: CCSDK-1307

Signed-off-by: bt2983 <bt2983@att.com>
Change-Id: I75ed1e3d8986960612b881b20de9283d2bdf3df9

(1 comment)

We don't allow new hardcoded passwords sorry

Patch Set 1:

Krzystof my understand for Frankfurt is your taking steps move change all helm chart to use secret password? 

NOTE: Here policy password has changed and need to be update in OOM.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Krzystof my understand for Frankfurt is your taking steps move change all helm chart to use secret password? 

True and as you can see network-name-gen already uses common secret template just the scope was reduced to work only on mariadb-galera passwords instead of all as it turned out to be infeasible to complete this in F.

So for the other passwords temporally they stay as they are but if you are adding new password or updating existing one you need to follow new rules.

As the change here would be very simple I can help you with that.

I'm only a little bit unsure if the password that you used is actually correct one. After deciding base64 I got:
healthcheck:zb!XztG34

It looks kind of weird for me to make any component use healthcheck account to communicate with any other component.

> 
> NOTE: Here policy password has changed and need to be update in OOM.
